category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates a GraphQL schema from a PostgreSQL schema; official docs describe building a GraphQL API from PostgreSQL.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is postgraphile; official docs brand the project as PostGraphile.
docs_sources: Official PostGraphile documentation has dedicated current and v5 documentation sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official PostGraphile docs link GitHub to graphile/crystal, whose README identifies it as home to PostGraphile and release postgraphile@5.0.3.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs identify GraphQL API generation from PostgreSQL; official repository topics include nodejs, graphql, postgres, schema.
